---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for TinyCML
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve. What are you trying to do that TinyCML currently does not support?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see. Include any API design ideas if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about or workarounds you're currently using.

## Additional Context

Any other context, references, or examples from other libraries.
